title: Diskit Monastery
tagline: Diskit Monastery — hill station of Ladakh (UT)

overview.short: Diskit Monastery also known as Deskit Gompa or Diskit Gompa is the oldest and largest Buddhist monastery (gompa) in Diskit, Nubra Valley of the Leh district of Ladakh.
overview.description: Diskit Monastery also known as Deskit Gompa or Diskit Gompa is the oldest and largest Buddhist monastery (gompa) in Diskit, Nubra Valley of the Leh district of Ladakh. It is 115 km north of Leh. It belongs to the Gelugpa (Yellow Hat) sect of Tibetan Buddhism and was founded by Changzem Tserab Zangpo, a disciple of Tsong Khapa, founder of Gelugpa, in the 14th century. It is a sub-gompa of the Thikse gompa.

topPlaces.name: Diskit
topPlaces.description: Diskit is a town in Nubra Valley, and headquarters of the Nubra district as well as the Diskit tehsil, a subdivision and community development block in Ladakh in India. The Diskit Monastery is located in this village.

topPlaces.name: Hundar, India
topPlaces.description: Hundar is a village in the Nubra district of Ladakh, India, famous for sand dunes and Bactrian camels. It is located in the Nubra tehsil, on the banks of the Shyok River.

items.note: Diskit is a town in Nubra Valley, and headquarters of the Nubra district as well as the Diskit tehsil, a subdivision and community development block in Ladakh in India. The Diskit Monastery is located in this village.
Hundar is a village in the Nubra district of Ladakh, India, famous for sand dunes and Bactrian camels. It is located in the Nubra tehsil, on the banks of the Shyok River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Diskit Monastery?
faq.a: The best time to visit Diskit Monastery is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Diskit Monastery?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kushok Bakula Rimpochee Airport, Leh (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Katra (Vaishno Devi railhead) (297 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Diskit Monastery?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Diskit Monastery at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Diskit Monastery?
faq.a: Stays in Diskit Monastery start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Diskit Monastery?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diskit, Hundar, India.
